title: Abandoned Watchtowers
description: Adds abandoned watchtowers to forest biomes
body:
![abandoned watchtowers banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/296e41a6ed63361dd1f15f70266b2aecdc9cf9cc.png)

# **Abandoned Watchtowers**

[![Modrinth Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2ea3cdec02ab0293f3439729230b00179b7fdf.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/abandoned-watchtowers) [![CurseForge Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6434a03cc60c25cda599cc38e579672513d8e6a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abandoned-watchtowers) [![Youtube Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa0320bef2db7e9ff5f983efdc3e322769152f9a.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MasterOWS)

This mod adds Abandoned Watchtowers to forest biomes.
Specificly forests, flower forests, taigas, birch forests and plains.

## **📝FEATURES:**
- Randomized room generation.
- Randomized diffrent stairs.
- Randomized loot generation.
- 2 diffrent versions, one much rarer.
- lights for visiblity from afar at night.
- diffrent tower hights.
- balcony chairs.

## **🙋Q&A:**
- **Q:** Are there multible beds in the Watchtower?
- A: _There is a room generation that has up to 4 beds for your friends!_

- **Q:** Is it campadible with other mods?
- A: _Yes! you can use any other mod with abandoned watchtowers!_

- **Q:** How do i change the spawn rate/spawn radius?
- A: _Use Berezka API for abandoned watchtowers to do that, you can find it [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berezka-api-for-abandoned-watchtowers) on CurseForge._

## **⚖️ GUIDELINES:**
Feel free to use Abandoned Watchtowers in any modpacks or Videos, credit is not necessary but highly recommended.

Only **CurseForge** and **Modrinth** are offical sites, other websites can contain malware or viruses in their files.

## **🔌VERSIONS:**
If you want a modded experience you can check out [Abandoned Watchtowers: Refurnished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abandoned-watchtowers-refurnished)


![Inside the tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f04ec54d7da4cd81bedac6e78dfda37e0849cc9c.png)

**If you like my Minecraft mods, then you can check out my YouTube content [Here](https://www.youtube.com/@MasterOWS)!**
